issues.detail: Requires Node.js 18+ with native fetch, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: Extract flagged AI sentences from a student essay via GPTZero
scenarios.rationale: Baseline guesses wrong host or Bearer auth and skips per-sentence shape; treatment uses the exact /v2/predict/text endpoint with x-api-key and filters highlight_sentence_for_ai.

scenarios.name: Classify a 400-word block using GPTZero's documented score thresholds
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses a binary > 0.5 cutoff on a guessed field; treatment reads completely_generated_prob and applies the documented three-tier thresholds for verdict labels.
